personas.name: Anxious Priya

financial_situation.loan_history: Never taken a formal loan before
financial_situation.biggest_financial_fear: Losing job and not being able to support parents

stress_triggers: Feeling judged for past financial mistakes

test_cases.label: Debt consolidation fear
test_cases.message: I have 80k credit card debt after a medical emergency and I'm scared of taking another loan.

test_cases.label: Credit score anxiety
test_cases.message: My credit score is only 680. Will I get rejected again?

test_cases.label: Jargon confusion
test_cases.message: Can you explain debt consolidation in simple words? I don't understand EMI or processing fees.

personas.name: Overwhelmed Rajesh

financial_situation.loan_history: 3 previous loans, always paid on time but struggled

stress_triggers: Feeling like he's failing as provider

test_cases.label: Cash flow pressure
test_cases.message: Three EMIs are due this week and a supplier payment came up unexpectedly.

test_cases.label: Business decline
test_cases.message: Sales dropped for the last 3 months and I don't know how to manage the loans.

test_cases.label: Loan term confusion
test_cases.message: I need ₹2 lakhs for inventory, but I don't understand loan terms or interest.

personas.name: Analytical Amit

demographics.name: Amit Verma
demographics.family_status: Married, no kids, planning to start family

stress_triggers: Feeling like he's being sold to

test_cases.label: Transparency check
test_cases.message: What is the real total cost including fees, and how does this compare to other lenders?

test_cases.label: Hidden fees concern
test_cases.message: I'm worried there are hidden charges in the offer. Show me everything upfront.

test_cases.label: Generic advice rejection
test_cases.message: Please don't give me marketing fluff. I want the actual numbers and tradeoffs.
